nasb.text: Do not think that I will accuse you before the Father; the one who accuses you is Moses, in whom you have set your hope.

esv.text: Do not think that I will accuse you to the Father. There is one who accuses you: Moses, on whom you have set your hope.

cnv.text: 不要以為我要向父控告你們，有一位控告你們的，就是你們所仰賴的摩西。

ccb.text: 不要以为我会在父面前控告你们，其实控告你们的是你们一直信赖的摩西。

csbs.text: 不要以为我将要在父面前控告你们，有一位控告你们的，就是你们所仰赖的摩西。
